# Security Policy

This is a solo pet project maintained by one person in their spare time.
I have no security review process, no response SLA, and no capacity to treat this as a serious security topic.

If you find something, you're welcome to open an issue.
I'll look at it when I can.
But please don't expect a formal response, a CVE, or a patched release on any particular timeline.

For what it's worth - it's a mobile game about defragmenting a hard drive.
The attack surface is limited.
Who cares?
